nodes.text: var WebSocket: new (url: string | URL, protocols?: string | string[]) => WebSocket
nodes.docs:
The `WebSocket` object provides the API for creating and managing a WebSocket connection to a server, as well as for sending and receiving data on the connection.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/WebSocket)

nodes.text: (property) WebSocket.onopen: ((this: WebSocket, ev: Event) => any) | null
(method) WebSocket.send(data: string | ArrayBufferLike | Blob | ArrayBufferView): void
nodes.docs:
The **`WebSocket.send()`** method enqueues the specified data to be transmitted to the server over the WebSocket connection, increasing the value of `bufferedAmount` by the number of bytes needed to contain the data.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/WebSocket/send)
An intrinsic object that provides functions to convert JavaScript values to and from the JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) format.

nodes.text: (method) JSON.stringify(value: any, replacer?: (this: any, key: string, value: any) => any, space?: string | number): string (+1 overload)
nodes.docs: Converts a JavaScript value to a JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) string.
tags: value A JavaScript value, usually an object or array, to be converted.
replacer A function that transforms the results.
space Adds indentation, white space, and line break characters to the return-value JSON text to make it easier to read.
{TypeError} If a circular reference or a BigInt value is found.

nodes.text: (property) WebSocket.onmessage: ((this: WebSocket, ev: MessageEvent) => any) | null

nodes.docs:
The **`data`** read-only property of the The data sent by the message emitter; this can be any data type, depending on what originated this event.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/MessageEvent/data)
An intrinsic object that provides functions to convert JavaScript values to and from the JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) format.

nodes.text: (method) JSON.parse(text: string, reviver?: (this: any, key: string, value: any) => any): any
nodes.docs: Converts a JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) string into an object.
tags:
reviver A function that transforms the results. This function is called for each member of the object.
If a member contains nested objects, the nested objects are transformed before the parent object is.

nodes.docs:
The **`data`** read-only property of the The data sent by the message emitter; this can be any data type, depending on what originated this event.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/MessageEvent/data)

The **`console.error()`** static method outputs a message to the console at the 'error' log level.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/console/error_static)

The **`console.log()`** static method outputs a message to the console.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/console/log_static)
